mapper.sql: id, task_id, strategy_type, strategy_expression, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_task_strategy ( id, task_id, strategy_type, strategy_expression, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{strategyType}, #{strategyExpression}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_task_strategy ( id, task_id, strategy_type, strategy_expression, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.strategyType}, #{item.strategyExpression}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_task_strategy t SET
t.task_id = #{taskId},
t.strategy_type = #{strategyType},
t.strategy_expression = #{strategyExpression},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_task_strategy t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_task_strategy t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_task_strategy t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_task_strategy t WHERE t.row_valid = 1 ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_task_strategy t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM tb_task_strategy t WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} AND t.row_valid = 1
